title: lindsaea oxyphylla
intro: Lindsaea oxyphylla, also known as the Lindsaea fern, is a species of fern in the genus Lindsaea. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lindsaea oxyphylla include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of various infections. Lindsaea oxyphylla is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also sometimes used in traditional medicine as a topical application for its wound-healing properties.
